content: C029 Concurrent Task Runtime: cooperative multitasking on C010 stack VM. Tasks have own stack/env/call_stack. Channels are buffered deques with send/recv blocking. Select compiles to try-send/try-recv + JUMP_IF_FALSE chains. Auto-preemption after N steps for fairness. Spawned tasks get dict copy of parent env (independent mutation). Zero implementation bugs at 114 tests.
